title: Webget Synchronization (sync)
text: Webget Synchronization (sync) Widget property that determines whether to reconnect the data field occurrences in the static server page to their database counterparts. sync = 0 | 1 Value Description 0 Do not synchronize data. 1 Use the webget statement to reconnect all occurrences in the static server page to their database counterparts. For requests that do not need reconnecting (for example, a Clear button), clear the Webget Synchronization property. Applies To Button Related Links webget Load data from a client request into a static server page (USP), reconnect to the database if applicable, set a current occurrence, and activate a detail or error trigger, if required.
